title: FAULHABER 为自主物流系统设计 DualGear
summary: FAULHABER has designed DualGear to offer high performance in space-constrained autonomous logistics applications. The post FAULHABER designs DualGear for autonomous logistics systems appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：FAULHABER designs DualGear for autonomous logistics systems）
